laws.title: Clear Search Box Visibility
laws.description: Ensure the search box is easily noticeable and accessible from the homepage.
laws.remediation: Apply high contrast and prominent placement for the search input area.

laws.title: Intuitive Navigation
laws.description: Provide easy access to essential Google services from the main page.
laws.remediation: Use a consistent menu structure with clear labels for better user guidance.

laws.title: Responsive Design
laws.description: Ensure the site functions well on various device sizes.
laws.remediation: Utilize media queries and flexible grids to adapt layouts across screen resolutions.

laws.title: Load Time Optimization
laws.description: Optimize the site's loading time for a better user experience.
laws.remediation: Leverage browser caching, minify resources and employ Lazy Loading techniques.

laws.title: Feedback Mechanisms
laws.description: Offer clear feedback on user actions such as searches or errors.
laws.remediation: Incorporate loading animations and informative error messages where appropriate.
